title: 这条 prompt 通过详细描述复古风格的蓝莓薰衣草汽水海报，结合了多种视觉元素和情感氛围，适合用于打造具有文艺气息的咖啡馆或甜品店的营销场景。
image_alt: 这条 prompt 通过详细描述复古风格的蓝莓薰衣草汽水海报，结合了多种视觉元素和情感氛围，适合用于打造具有文艺气息的咖啡馆或甜品店的营销场景。
prompt_original: Vintage-inspired blueberry lavender soda scrapbook poster, dreamy artisanal cafe advertisement aesthetic, sparkling layered blueberry soda with lavender cream foam and translucent ice cubes, ultra-realistic beverage photography blended with playful hand-drawn doodles and pastel marker sketches, fizzy carbonation bubbles visible through the glass, soft purple-to-blue gradient drink tones with creamy white foam top, whimsical handwritten cafe notes and tiny ingredient arrows, sticker-book collage layout with torn paper textures and washi tape accents, cozy Korean dessert cafe moodboard style, delicate lavender flower doodles, bows, stars, tiny moons, blueberries, and sparkles surrounding the drink, textured notebook paper scraps layered organically across the composition, trendy Pinterest-inspired beverage branding, warm cinematic natural window lighting, glossy condensation droplets and realistic glass reflections, editorial flatlay cafe photography mixed with journal-style illustrations, cute props like vintage spoons, blueberry pastries, mini flowers, recipe cards, cassette tapes, and polaroid snapshots, nostalgic Gen Z cafe aesthetic with Y2K undertones, dreamy soft-focus atmosphere, highly detailed scrapbook composition, artistic social-media-ready dessert shop poster vibe, soft pastel lavender, dusty blue, cream, and silver color palette, stylish lifestyle cafe photography, premium editorial food advertisement aesthetic.
prompt_zh: 复古灵感的蓝莓薰衣草汽水剪贴簿海报，梦幻的手工咖啡馆广告风格，带有薰衣草奶油泡沫和透明冰块的分层蓝莓汽水，超逼真的饮料摄影与俏皮的手绘涂鸦和柔和色彩的马克笔素描相结合，玻璃杯中可见气泡，饮品呈现柔和的紫色到蓝色渐变色调，顶部有奶油白色泡沫，手写咖啡馆笔记和小成分箭头，贴纸书拼贴布局，带有撕裂的纸张纹理和和纸胶带装饰，温馨的韩国甜品咖啡馆情绪板风格，精致的薰衣草花涂鸦、蝴蝶结、星星、小月亮、蓝莓和闪粉环绕着饮料，质感笔记本纸片有机地分布在构图中，流行的Pinterest风格饮料品牌设计，温暖的自然窗户光线，光亮的冷凝水滴和真实的玻璃反射，编辑式的平铺咖啡馆摄影与日记式插图混合，可爱的道具如复古勺子、蓝莓糕点、迷你花朵、食谱卡片、磁带和拍立得照片，怀旧的Z世代咖啡馆美学带有Y2K元素，梦幻的柔焦氛围，高度详细的剪贴簿构图，艺术性的社交媒体就绪甜品店海报风格，柔和的淡紫色、灰蓝色、奶油色和银色调色板，时尚的生活方式咖啡馆摄影，高端的食品广告风格。
